acceptance_targets: [c17_craft_01] Pass if a reader can identify a different page-level consequence at each scene ending anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:229, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:431: rent status changes in the first scene, family property status changes in the second, and Lena's relational/work commitments change in the third. Fail if the later two scenes still read primarily as repeats of the first scene's conclusion that June's money is necessary but not redemptive.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can identify a different page-level consequence at each scene ending anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:229, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:431: rent status changes in the first scene, family property status changes in the second, and Lena's relational/work commitments change in the third. Fail if the later two scenes still read primarily as repeats of the first scene's conclusion that June's money is necessary but not redemptive.
findings.evidence: The chapter lands the same governing beat multiple times: contaminated money is necessary, moral symmetry is unavailable, and Lena keeps moving. See snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:45, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:49, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:239, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:257, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:387, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:443.
findings.problem: Scene escalation softens into thematic reassertion. The first section already proves the contaminating necessity of June's repayment, but the trailer handoff and the Farah/Mateo dinner both circle back to the same explanatory conclusion instead of discovering distinct late-chapter consequences. That keeps the chapter emotionally coherent but structurally flatter than pass-level quality.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate the scene-end turns at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:229, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:241, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:383, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:431 from the first acceptance beat at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:45 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_17.md:51. Let scene two land on the irreversible family/property loss of handing over Rosa's keys, and let scene three land on Lena's new social boundary and work obligation, rather than restating the same moral thesis about dirty money in both places.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the embarrassing specifics: transfer amounts, body awkwardness, neighborhood petty detail, ugly motives, and the unstable overlap between care and control. When a choice arises between a safer generalized line and a sharper socially revealing one, choose the sharper line unless it breaks character truth.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches sex, money shame, betrayal, or bodily disgust and the prose flinches into summary or tasteful fog, revise toward concrete action, sensory residue, and social consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are normal in almost all spoken English here; full forms are reserved for emphasis, class performance, or moments of deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressed one-scene chapters with socially dense multi-scene chapters; follow hot chapters with quiet domestic ones, let comic humiliation sit beside grief, and vary dialogue density so no two consecutive chapters share the same pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary, unsanitized, class-attentive English with enough lyric lift to surprise but not enough polish to float above the bodies and bills in the room.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: tight third person centered on Lena, with no head-hopping; June and Eli are knowable only through what Lena hears, sees, infers, and later uncovers in artifacts.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, pressure-sensitive sentences that can hold embarrassment and desire in the same line, then snap short at moments of exposure or financial pain.
